response.justification: Maria has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and systems, with notable work in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling. However, her resume lacks clear evidence of direct experience with experimentation systems, feature flagging, or growth measurement platforms, which are core to the role. Her telemetry and distributed systems experience (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby) partially compensates, but experimentation-specific expertise is missing.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and micro-services at scale (e.g., Dunnhumby, Optilyz)
Proven ability to build foundational engineering systems (e.g., GISCollective, AI-agent infrastructure)
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentorship (e.g., workshops, Refactoring Dojos, TDD practices)
concerns: No explicit experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or growth systems
Limited evidence of statistical methods or experimental analysis in prior roles
Recent roles focus more on product development than systemic experimentation frameworks
